permitted_wording: The analysed complete-case file contains 212 completed survey responses.
forbidden_wording: A nationally representative survey of 212 Romanian SMEs.
evidence: submitdate non-empty and lastpage=20 in 212 rows

claim: The article is about SMEs only.
permitted_wording: The completed sample contains 172 SME-classified firms, 39 large firms and one respondent with missing firm size; SME-specific claims should use the SME-only subset.
evidence: Q00 counts: 36 micro, 57 small, 79 medium, 39 large, 1 missing

claim: Completed responses were collected from November 2024 to August 2025.
status: not supported by the uploaded complete-case file
permitted_wording: In the uploaded local complete-case file, completed submissions run from 17 to 31 August 2025; incomplete attempts begin earlier and must not define the analytical collection window unless independently documented.
forbidden_wording: Completed responses were collected from November 2024 through August 2025.

claim: Operational deployment of AI is about 15–17%.
status: not supported by G02Q04 as currently coded
permitted_wording: On G02Q04, 73/212 complete respondents selected “Folosim tehnologii AI în mod activ” (34.4%); among SME-classified respondents, 54/172 selected it (31.4%). Treat this as a self-reported category, not a Eurostat-equivalent adoption measure.
forbidden_wording: Only 15–17% actively use AI, unless a different validated variable supports it.

permitted_wording: On G02Q04, 203/212 respondents selected at least “Puțin familiarizat”; 173/212 selected one of the three more familiar categories.
forbidden_wording: Romanian SMEs are broadly familiar with AI, as a population-level claim.

claim: Cost and lack of expertise are dominant barriers.
status: permitted for the sample and SME-only subset after denominators are stated
permitted_wording: In the full completed sample, high implementation costs and lack of technical expertise were selected by 188/212 and 167/212 respondents respectively; SME-only denominators must be used in the main SME manuscript.
forbidden_wording: Romanian SMEs face these barriers at these exact population rates.

claim: No personal data were collected or retained.
status: not permitted for the local raw corpus
permitted_wording: The public analysis dataset should exclude IP addresses, exact timestamps and open text; the local raw export contains IP addresses and exact timing metadata.
forbidden_wording: No identifying personal data were collected or retained.
risk: fatal if public release contains raw file

claim: Government-support preferences can be represented as fiscal incentives/training/infrastructure percentages.
status: not supported by the current structured G01Q16 item alone
permitted_wording: The structured G01Q16 item measures perceived importance of government support, not a multi-response policy-instrument checklist; specific policy-instrument percentages require a documented qualitative coding protocol.
forbidden_wording: 82.5% supported fiscal incentives if this was inferred from undocumented coding.
evidence: G01Q16 is one categorical column plus comment column in export

claim: The survey has validated TOE or socio-technical scales.
permitted_wording: The questionnaire contains items that can be mapped conceptually to TOE and socio-technical constructs, but it was not designed as a validated psychometric scale.
forbidden_wording: Validated TOE scale / confirmed construct validity.
evidence: questionnaire structure; checklists and single items

claim: Open-text quotations may be used in the article.
permitted_wording: Use anonymised paraphrases or very short quotes only after manual disclosure review; do not combine rare role, sector and firm-size details with quotations.
forbidden_wording: Direct quotes with role/company/sector details in main paper.
